description:
The carnival has closed, but the real horror is just beginning. In Death Attraction, you awaken trapped inside a labyrinthine funhouse controlled by a terrifying, maniacal clown. What was supposed to be a thrilling amusement park ride has morphed into a spine-chilling fight for survival. The neon lights flicker, the eerie carnival music plays on a twisted loop, and somewhere in the shadows, a relentless killer is hunting you down.

To survive this house of horrors, you must rely entirely on your wits and observational skills. Explore the dark and eerie premises to find essential clues, uncover hidden secrets, and solve puzzles that unlock new areas of this deadly attraction. But always watch your back and tread carefully. The evil clown is cunning and will set treacherous traps and appear when you least expect it to stop you in your tracks.

As you make your way through confusing mazes and locked rooms, every corner you turn hides a new threat. Your only hope is to outsmart your painted tormentor and survive long enough to make a final, heart-stopping dash for freedom. Dive into this gripping, atmospheric survival horror experience. Face your deepest fears and prove that you have what it takes to escape the deadliest show on Earth.
